rationale: Retryable reads YAML spec test for GridFS expects 2 command_started events but driver intermittently emits 3; test expectations incorrect.
Auth spec says each mechanism property is independent; driver drops GSSAPI service name default when other auth properties are set.
Spec requires validating individual documents against maxBsonObjectSize; driver regressed on OP_QUERY path and skips per-doc validation.
Implementing OCSP URI options; Improvement type with empty description, insufficient detail to classify as nonconformance.
Deprecating old Ruby runtime version support; platform support change, no spec involvement.
Using server error codes instead of message string matching; error handling improvement, thin description, no specific spec rule cited.
Adding monitoring state display to client summary; diagnostic feature, not spec-related.
Updating change stream YAML tests to correctly express absence of event assertions per DRIVERS-1028 coordination ticket.
Investigation into whether multi-batch queries should be cached; internal query cache design question, not spec-related.
Input validation for invalid read concern sub-options during client construction; API ergonomics improvement, not a spec violation.
Adding explicit timeouts for DNS queries during SRV URI resolution; implementation robustness improvement, no specific spec rule cited.
Adding OCSP test coverage with ECDSA certificates and delegate responders per DRIVERS-1295; test infrastructure expansion.
Updating AWS credential keys in CSFLE tests per DRIVERS-1365; test credential rotation, not driver behavior change.
Query cache raises error when cursor iterated more than once; internal query cache implementation bug.
Adding readPreference and readConcern to query cache key; internal cache correctness improvement, not spec-related.
Updating SDAM monitoring YAML test files to add directConnection URI option per DRIVERS-1249 coordination ticket.
Adding documentation warning about BSON duplicate key names per DRIVERS-612; documentation only, no driver behavior change.
Clarifying TLS configuration behavior in documentation; docs update, no driver code change.
Adding try_next example to change stream resumption documentation; docs update, no driver behavior change.
Improving query cache handling of limits for sub-queries; internal optimization, not spec-related.
Adding OCSP test configurations to Evergreen CI; CI plumbing, not driver behavior or spec test change.
Replacing 'SSL' with 'TLS' in driver documentation; terminology update, no driver behavior change.
Implementing OCSP endpoint certificate revocation checking; new spec feature implementation, not fixing wrong existing behavior.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1042 + Improvement type; proactive CMAP spec-rollout work, not fixing wrong existing driver behavior.
Implementing OCSP response cache; new feature implementation, empty description.
Marking operation result class as public API; API visibility change, no spec involvement.
Adding OCSP with insecure configurations to Evergreen CI; CI plumbing, empty description.
Adding custom OCSP test scenarios; non-YAML test coverage expansion, not spec test runner or UTF work.
Allowing query cache to handle multi-batch queries; query cache feature extension, not spec-related.
Invalidating query cache during $out/$merge aggregations; query cache behavior improvement, empty description.
Restructuring query cache invalidation to be per-collection for efficiency; internal optimization, no spec involvement.
C99 compiler error in bson_ext C extension on macOS; build failure, no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Invalidating query cache on bulk writes; query cache feature, empty description.
Tracking ticket for query cache documentation updates; documentation only.
Count queries cached under nil key due to missing collection name in cache key; internal query cache bug.
Session leak in query cache implementation; internal resource management bug, not a spec violation.
Documenting and implementing query cache exclusion of system collections; internal policy with docs update.
JRuby ByteBuffer advances read and write positions together causing BSON deserialization failure; JRuby-specific runtime bug.
Server-selection and URI-options specs don't mandate lowercasing tag names; driver incorrectly downcases them causing selection failures.
Driver logs misleading error when bulk write is split and retried successfully; logging improvement only.
Adding explain verbosity parameter to Collection::View::Explainable API; feature addition, not spec-related.
SDAM spec requires marking servers unknown on network errors; connection setup failures stopped triggering this after pool rearchitecture.
Auth mechanism properties not normalized to lowercase when Ruby symbol keys used with host-based client; Ruby-specific API normalization bug.
Documentation explaining behavioral differences between Ruby and PCRE regular expressions; docs update only.
Specifying empty authSource URI option behavior per DRIVERS-808; resolution 'Done' suggests spec-level clarification, thin description.
Ignoring batchSize=0 for aggregate $out per SPEC-1169/DRIVERS-587; Improvement implementing spec change, not fixing existing wrong behavior.
Clearing session pools after forking per DRIVERS-578/SPEC-1163; Improvement type implementing spec requirement, handled via existing reconnect guidance.
Better error diagnostics when inserting non-hash documents; developer experience improvement, no spec violation.
CRUD spec defines estimatedDocumentCount without filter support; driver silently ignores filter conditions instead of raising an error.
Cursors spec requires using namespace from find response for getMore; driver hardcodes original collection namespace causing Atlas Data Lake failures.
